name: Maple Brickle Nut Torte
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F (163°C). Grease and flour two 8-inch or 9-inch round cake pans.
2. In a large bowl, blend all cake ingredients except nuts until moistened. Beat for 2 minutes at high speed; fold in nuts.
3. Pour batter into prepared pans. Bake 9-inch layers for 30-40 minutes; 8-inch layers for 35-45 minutes.
4. Cool cakes 15 minutes in pans. Loosen sides and remove from pans. Cool completely.
5. In a small bowl, dissolve drink mix and instant coffee in hot water. Add powdered sugar, Heath Brickle Bits, and margarine; beat until fluffy.
6. Slice cooled cake into 4 layers. Gently spread 1/3 filling between each layer.
7. For frosting: In a small bowl, combine Cool Whip and powdered sugar. Frost top and sides of cake.
8. Garnish with whole or halves walnuts. Refrigerate cake for at least 2 hours before serving.
